query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  name, 
  atollId,
  difficulty,
  maxDepth,
  minDepth,
  SUBSTRING(description, 1, 100) as description_preview,
  marineLife,
  bestSeason,
  rating
FROM activity_spots 
WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT 
  id, 
  name, 
  atollId,
  difficulty,
  maxDepth,
  minDepth,
  SUBSTRING(description, 1, 100) as description_preview,
  marineLife,
  bestSeason,
  rating
FROM activity_spots 
WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' 
LIMIT 10;
